title: Drugs and medication - Canada.ca
content:
## Drugs and medication
Safe consumption, production, selling, licensing, regulations.
- Applying for a supervised consumption site
- Adverse reaction and medical device problem reporting
- Get help with substance use

## Services and information
Cannabis laws, legalization and regulation, cannabis health effects and safety risks.

### Drug product database
Approved drugs, human pharmaceutical and biological drugs, veterinary drugs, radiopharmaceutical drugs and disinfectant products.

### Counterfeit prescription drugs
Counterfeit prescription drugs, avoiding counterfeit prescription drugs, prevention.

### Smoking, vaping and tobacco
Learn about vaping, tobacco products, effects of smoking, second-hand smoke, prevention and quitting.
Information about the use of legal and illegal drugs, and alcohol. Find out how to get help. Learn about stigma.

### Prescription stimulants
About stimulants, including the effects, risks of problematic use, preventing harm, and how to get help.
